name: MARCHEX INC
business: Marchex provides AI-powered conversation intelligence solutions for market-leading companies in B2B2C vertical markets, leveraging generative AI and data analytics to analyze phone calls, texts, and other communication channels.

exposures.sentence: Marchex provides AI-powered conversation intelligence solutions for market-leading companies in leading business-to-business-to-consumer ("B2B2C") vertical markets, including many of the world s most innovative and successful brands.
